SEPARATE STATEMENT OF MATERIAL FACTS IN OPPOSITION TO PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION (TRANSACTION ID # 58743596) FILED BY DEFENDANT PODLISHEVSKY, RACHEL

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. A NATIONAL BANKING'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED IN ITS ENTIRETY. PLAINTIFF DID NOT SATISFY ITS BURDEN OF PRODUCTION THAT IT IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR IN THE AMOUNT OF $74,782.96 OR ANY OTHER AMOUNT. PLAINTIFF'S SEPARATE STATEMENT PRESENTS INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE OF THE TERMS OF THE 2008 SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND THE TERMS THAT ARE RECITED ARE DIFFERENT THAN WHAT ARE STATED IN MR. KRITZER'S DECLARATION. MOREOVER, DEFENDANT RACHEL PODLISHEVSKY BY HER DECLARATION HAS CREATED TRIABLE ISSUES REGARDING THE TERMS OF THE 2008 SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, WHETHER SHE BREACHED THAT AGREEMENT, AND WHETHER SHE OWES ANYTHING TO PLAINTIFF. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PROVIDE A FORM OF ORDER THAT TRACKS THE TENTATIVE RULING PURSUANT CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Re Default In Payments
Off Calendar Jun-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yvonne Ramirez-Browning of Office of The General Counsel, Wells Fargo & Co. telephone number 626-965-9465 appeared by telephone for Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank.
Defendant Rachel Podlishevsky telephone number 415-987-4639 in Propria Persona.

The parties reported that they were unable to work things out. PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'S Motion To Enter Judgment Re Default In Payments is granted. Ms. Ramirez-Browning is to prepare a form of order that conforms to the tentative ruling of the prior hearing and comply with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Re Default In Payments
Off Calendar May-23-2016 Continued To Jun-23-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yvonne Browning of Office of The General Counsel, Wells Fargo & Co. telephone number 626-965-9465 appeared by telephone for Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank.
Defendant Rachel Podlishevsky telephone number 415-987-4639 in Propia Persona.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court vacated its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK'S Motion To Enter Judgment Re Default In Payments is continued to June 23, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 to give the parties the opportunity to resolve the matter/issues.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Apr-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. A NATIONAL BANKING'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication is denied in its entirety. Plaintiff did not satisfy its burden of production that it is entitled to judgment in its favor in the amount of $74,782.96 or any other amount. Plaintiff's separate statement presents insufficient evidence of the terms of the 2008 settlement agreement and the terms that are recited are different than what are stated in Mr. Kritzer's declaration. Moreover, defendant Rachel Podlishevsky by her declaration has created triable issues regarding the terms of the 2008 settlement agreement, whether she breached that agreement, and whether she owes anything to plaintiff. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order that tracks the tentative ruling pursuant CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
